/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libOpenMMMPIDReference.so -o libOpenMMMPIDReference.so CMakeFiles/OpenMMMPIDReference.dir/src/MPIDReferenceKernelFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenMMMPIDReference.dir/src/MPIDReferenceKernels.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenMMMPIDReference.dir/src/SimTKReference/MPIDReferenceForce.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenMMMPIDReference.dir/src/SimTKReference/fftpack.cpp.o   -L/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/lib  -L/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/lib/plugins  -Wl,-rpath,/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/Documents/project/PhyNEO/phyneo_openmm/MPIDOpenMMPlugin/build-openmm840-linux-cuda:/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/lib:/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/lib/plugins: -lOpenMM ../../libMPIDPlugin.so -lOpenMM
